text:
“State” means any state, territory or possession of the United States, the District of Columbia, or any province of the Dominion of Canada.

ADMINISTRATION
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 485
##### § 485.120 — “State” defined.

“State” means any state, territory or possession of the United States, the District of Columbia, or any province of the Dominion of Canada.

ADMINISTRATION

subsections.text: “State” means any state, territory or possession of the United States, the District of Columbia, or any province of the Dominion of Canada.
